title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 1 - 2017: Bike Tour in Europe in 2010 in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a catch-up vlog on March 2nd, 2017, explaining why he missed the previous day's video: he drank alcohol for the first time in five months (six 3.2% margaritas), got severely ill, and passed out. He also reflects on feeling overworked from a long session fixing and reorganizing his YouTube page and personal website, and briefly previews upcoming tasks like financial planning and picking up his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds it interesting and broadly agrees — spend on people, tax the rich to stimulate the economy
regrets the experiment — got physically wrecked and calls it a bad idea
acknowledges he overdid it and contributed to feeling unwell

claims.subject: Mark Belive
claims.claim: Mark Belive is an economist who explains the economy in an interesting way.

claims.subject: economy
claims.claim: Austerity is bad; we should take money from the rich and spend it on people to get the economy going.

claims.subject: background
claims.claim: I'm recording the video before I made the background.

claims.subject: alcohol
claims.claim: I pounded six margaritas but didn't feel anything because it was 3.2 or 2.2 super market alcohol.

claims.subject: body
claims.claim: My belly felt like it was on fire after drinking, similar to when you're out of shape and exercise a lot.

claims.subject: body
claims.claim: My whole body and intestines felt like they were on fire, causing excruciating pain.

claims.subject: video
claims.claim: I passed out and couldn't get up to do the video because of the pain.

claims.subject: sleep
claims.claim: Whenever I drink, I wake up early the next day.

claims.subject: work
claims.claim: I've been working since I woke up because I couldn't do the outcome I was expecting.

claims.subject: YouTube
claims.claim: I came across my YouTube videos page on my website and realized I needed to add the time and filter out deleted videos.

claims.subject: website
claims.claim: I've been neglecting my website since I moved to Boulder in 2013.

claims.subject: calendar
claims.claim: I went to my calendar page and plugged videos into it, which was an easy thing to do.

claims.subject: work
claims.claim: I have a lot of work to do, including putting together my financial thing for many can.

claims.subject: rent
claims.claim: I have to pay rent and give money to my brothers.

claims.subject: car
claims.claim: I'll get my car on Monday and see if I can stay intact into liking so that I don't be interesting.
